news.title: Super Micro Computer soars as AI demand drives massive revenue beat
news.summary: Investing.com -- Super Micro Computer Inc (NASDAQ:SMCI) shares jumped 7.3% in after-hours trading Tuesday after the AI server provider reported fiscal second-quarter results that significantly exceeded analyst expectations and raised its full-year outlook.

news.title: Super Micro Computer Q2 Adj. EPS $0.69 Beats $0.49 Estimate, Sales $12.682B Beat $10.216B Estimate
news.summary: Super Micro Computer (NASDAQ:SMCI) reported quarterly earnings of $0.69 per share which beat the analyst consensus estimate of $0.49 by 41.68 percent. This is a 16.95 percent increase over earnings of $0.59 per share

news.title: Super Micro Computer Reports After the Close, and Wall Street Expects 82% Revenue Growth
news.summary: Super Micro Computer (NASDAQ: SMCI) reports Q2 fiscal 2026 earnings today, Feb. 3, after the market close at 4:05 p.m. EST. Wall Street is expecting EPS of 48 cents to 49 cents on revenue of $10.34 to $10.44 billion, representing 82% to 83.8% year-over-year (YOY) growth. news.title: Super Micro Computer (SMCI) Q2 Earnings and Revenues Beat Estimates
news.summary: Super Micro (SMCI) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of +40.10% and +21.42%, respectively, for the quarter ended December 2025. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

news.title: Supermicro Announces Second Quarter Fiscal Year 2026 Financial Results
news.summary: SAN JOSE, Calif., February 03, 2026--Super Micro Computer, Inc. (NASDAQ: SMCI) ("Supermicro" or the "Company"), a Total IT Solution Provider for AI, Cloud, Storage, and 5G/Edge, today announced unaudited financial results for its second quarter of fiscal year 2026 ended December 31, 2025.

news.title: Super Micro (NASDAQ:SMCI) Reports Bullish Q4 CY2025, Stock Soars
news.summary: Server solutions provider Super Micro (NASDAQ:SMCI) reported Q4 CY2025 results exceeding the market’s revenue expectations, with sales up 123% year on year to $12.68 billion. On top of that, next quarter’s revenue guidance ($12.3 billion at the midpoint) was surprisingly good and 20.5% above what analysts were expecting. Its non-GAAP profit of $0.69 per share was 41.4% above analysts’ consensus estimates.
